symptoms.symptom_name: Burning stocking-glove pain/allodynia spreading proximally, with dysautonomia

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Small fibre neuropathy flare with dysautonomia
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Burning stocking-glove pain with allodynia and autonomic features is the small-fibre-neuropathy phenotype.
Warm, normally-coloured limbs argue strongly against acute arterial occlusion.

symptoms.symptom_name: No new true motor weakness/ascending paralysis; normal breathing/swallowing

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Preserved power and normal bulbar/respiratory function argue against an ascending motor neuropathy.

symptoms.symptom_name: No true syncope; orthostatic dizziness settling supine

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Orthostatic dizziness/tachycardia settling supine reflects small-fibre autonomic involvement.

symptoms.symptom_name: High fall risk from dysautonomia/pain, isolated with hazards

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Near-syncope with pain-immobility and obstacles while alone creates a fall risk.

symptoms.symptom_name: Stocking-glove allodynia, preserved reflexes/power, strong equal pulses; postural BP drop with tachycardia (examination)

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Small fibre neuropathy flare with dysautonomia
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Allodynia with preserved reflexes/power, strong pulses and a postural BP drop fits small-fibre neuropathy with autonomic involvement.
Preserved reflexes/proprioception and prior normal EMG argue against large-fibre neuropathy.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Small fibre neuropathy flare with dysautonomia
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Burning stocking-glove pain with allodynia and orthostatic dysautonomia, with warm perfused limbs and preserved power, is a small-fibre-neuropathy flare — but limb ischaemia and ascending motor weakness can't be examined remotely, and the fall risk is high, so urgent in-person review plus fall-safety and supportive measures are required, with 000 for a fixed pale/cold/pulseless limb, new true weakness/breathing problems, or true syncope.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: In-person neurological and vascular examination (power, reflexes, pulses)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: To exclude limb ischaemia and an evolving motor neuropathy; cannot be done via chat.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Work-up for secondary causes of SFN (glucose/HbA1c, B12, TFTs, autoimmune/ANA, ± skin biopsy)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Idiopathic SFN warrants exclusion of treatable secondary causes.
